nasb.text: But I tell you that every careless word that people speak, they shall give an accounting for it in the day of judgment.

esv.text: I tell you, on the day of judgment people will give account for every careless word they speak,

cnv.text: 我告訴你們，人所說的閒話，在審判的日子，句句都要供出來，

ccb.text: 我告诉你们，在审判之日，人将为自己所说的每一句闲话负责，

csbs.text: 我告诉你们：人所说的每一句无益的话，在那审判的日子，句句都要做出交代，
